mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT location FROM queue_data ORDER BY location
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM queue_data ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT restaurant_name FROM queue_data ORDER BY restaurant_name
SELECT MAX(stat_time) FROM queue_data WHERE stat_time = DATE_FORMAT(stat_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM queue_data WHERE location = #{location}
SELECT DISTINCT restaurant_name FROM queue_data WHERE location = #{location}
SELECT DISTINCT restaurant_name FROM queue_data WHERE category = #{category}
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM queue_data WHERE restaurant_name = #{restaurantName}
